arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern win race to sign Tom Bischof
arts.sum: Bayern München have reportedly won the race to sign Tom Bischof on a free transfer from TSG Hoffenheim.
